hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$FILE" =~ luminaries.*\.(js|ts|jsx|tsx|mjs)$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ node_modules ]]; then echo ""; echo "Luminaries Performance Budget v5.2 (non-blocking reminder):"; echo "  - Target: 20 FPS minimum, <200 draw calls"; echo "  - No allocations in animation loops (new Vector3/Material/Geometry inside update() = bad)"; echo "  - Share materials/geometries via module-scoped _ prefix variables (const _tempVec = new Vector3())"; echo "  - Use seeded RNG for procedural generation"; echo "  - Colors from constants objects, never inline hex"; echo "  - Functional style: const/let only, named imports"; echo "  - Verify FPS in browser DevTools Performance panel after this change"; echo ""; if grep -qE "new (Vector3|Vector2|Color|Material|Geometry|BufferGeometry)\s*\(" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then INLOOP=$(grep -cE "(function update|function animate|requestAnimationFrame)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$INLOOP" -gt 0 ]; then echo "ANTI-PATTERN CHECK: File contains both an animation loop AND new Vector/Material allocations. Verify allocations are outside the loop."; fi; fi; fi'
